channel.title: NFLX — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on NFLX (Netflix) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED NFLX (+1108%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chase Coleman)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED NFLX (+912%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 2.9% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED NFLX (+691%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: EXITED NFLX (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) exited NFLX in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED NFLX (-64%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed NFLX in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED NFLX (+35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio. Adding Netflix.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Lee Ainslie)

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED NFLX (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 4.0% of portfolio. Adding to Netflix on profitability.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)
